name: @comath/pi-extension
description: CoMath Pi Lab extension package for auditable mathematical research workflows in Pi.

scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/phase6-extension.test.mjs && node tests/phase8-subagents.test.mjs && node tests/phase12-paper-tools.test.mjs && node tests/phase15-dashboard.test.mjs && node tests/phase18-pi-official-adapter.test.mjs && node tests/phase22-pi-install.test.mjs
